latin: Isaac Newton sub arbore sedebat et cogitabat. malum de ramo cecidit et caput eius percussit. 'cur omnia ad terram cadunt?' rogavit. ex hac quaestione simplici legem gravitatis invenit.

questions.prompt: What did Newton discover from this event?

translation: Isaac Newton was sitting under a tree and thinking. An apple fell from a branch and struck his head. 'Why do all things fall to the ground?' he asked. From this simple question he discovered the law of gravity.
